message:
feat: unittest TestCase.addCleanup method support (no-op)

- Add genAddCleanup to lifecycle.zig that emits _ = self
- Register addCleanup in UnittestMethods map in method_calls.zig
- Re-export from unittest/mod.zig

This enables tests using self.addCleanup() to compile. The cleanup
functions are not actually called (no-op), but this unblocks many tests.
